suggestions.title: App.jsx is 1000+ lines — extract components (8th flag)
suggestions.description: App.jsx contains WorkerCard, StatsBar, ActivityLog, ProgressBar, DeltaBadge, StatusBadge, EmptyState, LoadingSkeleton all inline. Each should be its own file. This is the 8th time flagging this. Extract at minimum: WorkerCard.jsx, StatsBar.jsx, ActivityLog.jsx, ProgressBar.jsx. Import them back. This is a maintainability blocker.

suggestions.title: React.memo missing on hot-path components (11th flag)
suggestions.description: WorkerCard, ActivityLogEntry, StatusBadge, ProgressBar all re-render on every 30s poll even when their props haven't changed. Wrap with React.memo. WorkerCard is the most expensive — it contains ProgressBar, StatusBadge, and task tag logic. This causes unnecessary DOM diffing on every sync cycle.

suggestions.title: No ErrorBoundary — any component crash kills entire app (8th flag)
suggestions.description: If any worker card, the office floor, or activity log throws during render, the entire app white-screens. Add a React ErrorBoundary wrapper around at minimum the tab panels. A simple class component with componentDidCatch that shows 'Something went wrong, click to retry' would suffice. This is especially important since data comes from an external JSON file that could have unexpected shapes.

suggestions.title: vibeStreak increment logic uses sessionStorage incorrectly
suggestions.description: The vibeStreak effect runs on every render where teamVibe.key changes, but it reads from sessionStorage and increments even on the initial mount. On first load, storedKey is null, so it always resets to 1. Then on the next poll (30s later), if vibe hasn't changed, it increments to 2. The streak counter is essentially meaningless — it counts poll cycles, not actual vibe persistence across meaningful time periods. Fix: store the streak in a ref and only persist to sessionStorage on unmount, or use a timestamp-based approach.

suggestions.title: Office floor Character divs missing role='button' and keyboard activation
suggestions.description: Character components in Office.jsx have tabIndex={0} and onClick but no role attribute and no onKeyDown handler. Screen readers won't announce them as interactive. Pressing Enter/Space while focused does nothing. Add role='button' and onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') onClick?.(worker) }}.

suggestions.title: completionToast blocks pointer events
suggestions.description: The completion toast has pointerEvents: 'none' which is correct, but it's positioned with position:fixed at bottom:2rem covering potential click targets. The real issue: it has no exit animation — it just vanishes after 3s. Add a fade-out keyframe for the last 300ms.

suggestions.title: WORKER_ROLE_COLORS duplicates ROLE_COLORS from constants.js
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 17 defines WORKER_ROLE_COLORS mapping worker names to colors for confetti. constants.js already has ROLE_COLORS mapping roles to colors. The hex values even diverge (Maya: #a855f7 vs #a78bfa). Either document the intent or derive confetti color from ROLE_COLORS[worker.role].

suggestions.title: Mobile: large dead zone below office floor view
suggestions.description: On 375px mobile, there's ~250px of empty space between the office floor and footer due to .main flex:1 expanding beyond content. The office floor has fixed aspect-ratio:4/3 that doesn't fill available space. Add min-height:auto to .main on mobile or remove the flex expansion.

suggestions.title: ActivityLog entry keys include array index — fragile under filter changes
suggestions.description: key={entry.timestamp + entry.worker + i} uses index which shifts when filters toggle, forcing React to remount all entries. Use a purely data-derived key: key={entry.timestamp + '-' + (entry.worker || 'system') + '-' + entry.type}.

suggestions.title: Whiteboard text splits mid-word on mobile
suggestions.description: On 375px viewport, the whiteboard shows '⚡ FL\nOW' — word breaks mid-word due to narrow width. Use a smaller font-size in mobile media query for .office-whiteboard, or show just the emoji below a certain breakpoint.

suggestions.title: Ghost character OOO tooltips unreachable on touch devices
suggestions.description: Ghost characters show OOO bubble on hover only. No touch equivalent exists. Consider adding onClick handler for ghosts that toggles the bubble, or make OOO info always visible as a small badge on mobile.

suggestions.title: No loading state when switching between activity log filters
suggestions.description: When clicking filter buttons (All/Hires/Completions/Errors), the list re-renders instantly which is fine, but if the list is long, there's no visual feedback that the filter changed. The active button styling helps but consider a brief fade transition on the list.
